params.name: storage_file_path
params.description: The absolute or relative path to the text file used for persistent task storage.

params.name: storage_file_format
params.description: The data serialization format for the storage file (e.g., jsonl, csv, tsv).

params.name: storage_permissions
params.description: The octal file permission mode set when creating or updating the storage file.

params.name: backup_enabled
params.description: Whether to create a backup copy of the storage file before writing changes.

params.name: backup_path
params.description: The directory path where backup copies of the storage file are stored.

params.name: argument_delimiter
params.description: The character or sequence used to separate command line arguments during parsing.

params.name: strict_mode
params.description: Whether to fail execution immediately if an unknown or invalid command line argument is detected.

params.name: input_encoding
params.description: The character encoding used for reading and writing text input and storage files.

params.name: max_task_id_length
params.description: The maximum allowed length for a task identifier (UUID) to prevent buffer overflows.

params.name: output_color_scheme
params.description: The terminal color scheme to use for output formatting (e.g., auto, monochrome, bright).

params.name: output_width
params.description: The maximum width in characters for formatted output lines before wrapping.

params.name: timestamp_format
params.description: The string format pattern used to display timestamps in task records and output.

params.name: verbose_mode
params.description: Whether to output detailed execution logs and intermediate processing steps to standard output.
